name: plan-agent-skill
description: Plan mode for Hermes — inspect context, write a markdown plan into the active workspace's `.hermes/plans/` directory, and do not execute the work.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 plan 相關工作
幫我啟用 plan 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 plan

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the plan skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
